parts.text:
You are a research assistant for a clinical EBM (medicina baseada em evidência) pipeline. Answer this research question with PMID-grade evidence using google_search grounding.

QUESTION: Como meta-análises diferem entre design do estudo primário: RCT clássica vs coorte/observacional vs acurácia diagnóstica (DTA)? Inclua premissas estatísticas, ferramentas RoB específicas (RoB-2, Newcastle-Ottawa, QUADAS-2), e exemplos seminais por categoria.
QUESTION_ID: Q1-design-primario-pathB
CONTEXT (existing evidence excerpt): null

REQUIREMENTS (zero-tolerance):
- Cite PMIDs (numeric only, e.g., 12345678) when claiming empirical findings
- List UNVERIFIED PMIDs in candidate_pmids_unverified array — do NOT fabricate; "I do not know" beats fabrication
- Distinguish established literature framing (cite paper, confidence: high) vs your paraphrase (confidence: medium)
- Acknowledge gaps explicitly via gaps array
- Output ONLY JSON matching the schema below — NO preamble, NO postamble, NO markdown wrapper

REQUIRED OUTPUT (JSON, schema-strict):
{
  "schema_version": "1.0",
  "produced_at": "<ISO-8601 now>",
  "research_question_id": "Q1-design-primario-pathB",
  "research_question": "Como meta-análises diferem entre design do estudo primário: RCT clássica vs coorte/observacional vs acurácia diagnóstica (DTA)? Inclua premissas estatísticas, ferramentas RoB específicas (RoB-2, Newcastle-Ottawa, QUADAS-2), e exemplos seminais por categoria.",
  "external_brain_used": "gemini-3.1-pro-preview + google_search",
  "codex_cli_version": null,
  "findings": [
    {
      "claim": "<factual claim in 1-2 sentences>",
      "supporting_sources": [
        {"type": "pmid|doi|url|verbatim", "value": "<id>", "verified": false}
      ],
      "confidence": "high|medium|low",
      "convergence_signal": "<alignment | divergence | novel>"
    }
  ],
  "candidate_pmids_unverified": ["12345678", "..."],
  "convergence_flags": [
    {"type": "alignment|divergence|gap", "description": "<short reason>"}
  ],
  "confidence_overall": "high|medium|low",
  "gaps": ["<what you could not answer>"]
}

Quality over quantity (~3-6 findings max). Cover all three meta-analysis types: RCT-based (RoB-2), observational/cohort (Newcastle-Ottawa), and diagnostic test accuracy (QUADAS-2). For each: statistical assumptions, pooling model rationale, and 1-2 seminal examples with PMIDs. Output ONLY the JSON object — no other text.
